title: selaginella nanuzae
intro: Selaginella nanuzae, also known as the 'Brazilian rose gold', is a species of spore-producing plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella, a group of evergreen, vascular plants. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella nanuzae is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are said to promote overall well-being and vitality.
